problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: The key to What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? is Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus — specifically Sleep-dependent memory consolidation — which would help 200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
